questions.objective_ref: Explain in plain words what a Python function is and why functions exist.
Write a function using the `def` keyword with correct Python syntax.
Call (run) a function by name and observe when the code inside it executes.
Choose a clear, descriptive name for a function that signals what it does.
Recognise the difference between defining a function and calling a function.
Identify where functions appear in real AI-adjacent Python scripts.
